metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by Svyatoslav Shmidt

plugins.name: context-mode-rust
plugins.description: Claude Code MCP plugin that saves 98% of your context window. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, local code indexing with semantic search, vault graph analysis, dead-code detection, cyclomatic complexity analysis, dependency graph extraction, and intent-driven search.
